untranslatable_reason: Morning Doji Star is a specific candlestick pattern requiring multi-candle analysis (previous candle body size, current candle doji properties, and gap analysis). The allowed indicators do not include explicit pattern recognition for doji formations or multi-candle pattern detection. Descending triangle breakout approximated using Donchian Channel upper bound as proxy for triangle resistance. Doji and gap confirmation cannot be precisely expressed with available indicators.
translation_notes: Approximated entry: (1) Price closes above descending triangle resistance (modeled as dc_upper from Donchian Channel), (2) Gap open higher (modeled as open > prev_close). Exit: Price closes below triangle support (dc_lower). The Morning Doji Star pattern itself—requiring specific wick-to-body ratios and prior downtrend—cannot be fully captured without explicit pattern matching.
